task_summary: Design the first version of the writeback-router skill.

source_refs.summary: Approved design spec defining writeback-router scope and schema.

items.title: Plugin update scope behavior
items.summary: Claude plugin update checks user scope by default, so project-scoped plugins require an explicit project scope and correct working directory.
items.reason: This is a reusable low-risk tool behavior discovery that can improve future plugin maintenance.

items.title: Writeback router schema
items.summary: The writeback-router artifact uses a batch intent with independently routed items.
items.reason: This is durable design knowledge that belongs in a domain wiki only after review.

items.title: Temporary command output
items.summary: A one-time git status check confirmed the exploration repo was clean.
items.reason: The command output has no future decision value after the task is closed.
